ecarx.carext.vehicle.module

Annotation Type ILamp.ExteriorLightControlValue


  • @Retention(value=SOURCE)
public static @interface ILamp.ExteriorLightControlValue

    • Field Detail

      • LAMP_EXTERIOR_LIGHT_CONTROL_POS_

        public static final int LAMP_EXTERIOR_LIGHT_CONTROL_POS_
        Exterior light control: Position light(位置灯)

      • LAMP_EXTERIOR_LIGHT_CONTROL_LOWB

        public static final int LAMP_EXTERIOR_LIGHT_CONTROL_LOWB
        Exterior light control: Low beam(近光灯)

      • LAMP_EXTERIOR_LIGHT_CONTROL_AUTO

        public static final int LAMP_EXTERIOR_LIGHT_CONTROL_AUTO
        Exterior light control: Automatic(自动)

      • LAMP_EXTERIOR_LIGHT_CONTROL_AHBC

        public static final int LAMP_EXTERIOR_LIGHT_CONTROL_AHBC
        Exterior light control: Adaptive High Beam(自动远光灯)

      • LAMP_EXTERIOR_LIGHT_CONTROL_OFF

        public static final int LAMP_EXTERIOR_LIGHT_CONTROL_OFF
        Exterior light control: off
